playbook.intent: Convert one repeated client problem into a fixed-price, fixed-scope offer with a landing page, a booking flow, and 3 paid pilots — moving the freelancer from per-hour to per-outcome billing.
playbook.scope: Convert one repeated client problem into a fixed-price, fixed-scope offer with a landing page, a booking flow, and 3 paid pilots — moving the freelancer from per-hour to per-outcome billing.

success-criteria.criterion: Pick the pattern stage complete: Candidate list with scoring
Price + landing stage complete: Landing page live
Pilot run stage complete: 3 paid pilots delivered
Promote + transition stage complete: 3 case studies live

stage.name: Pick the pattern
stage.intent: Identify one repeated engagement worth productizing.

tasks.task: Review last 12 months of invoices for repeated work
Score candidates by repeat frequency + margin
Pick one; write a 1-page service brief

stage.decision-gate: Advance when one candidate scores 2x above others on repeat + margin. Otherwise iterate.

stage.name: Price + landing
stage.intent: Fixed price + landing page + booking flow live.
stage.decision-gate: Advance once landing is live and ≥3 prospects could complete booking end-to-end.

stage.name: Pilot run
stage.intent: 3 paid pilots prove the offer ships in fixed scope without scope creep.

tasks.task: Deliver against SOP; log time vs estimate

stage.decision-gate: Advance when ≥2/3 pilots ship within estimated time. If all over, fix SOP before scaling.

stage.name: Promote + transition
stage.intent: Make the productized offer the default sale; transition hourly clients.

tasks.task: Stop quoting hourly for this work; defer requests to the offer

stage.decision-gate: Productized offer must become default within 6 weeks of launch. If hourly still dominant, audit pricing.

extra.value: [Hiring employees or building a team — solo operator throughout, Enterprise procurement processes — SMB / startup buyers only]
[Active freelance practice with at least one paying client, A bookkeeping / time-tracking baseline in place]
[Treating decision_gate as a suggestion — playbook collapses to a checklist if gates are not enforced, Skipping written artifacts because 'it's in my head' — kills traceability and future re-use]
['Did every stage produce a written artifact a stranger could read?', 'Did I actually advance only when the decision_gate criterion was met?']

{human: faion get-content productized-service-launch --format md, agent: faion get-content productized-service-launch --format context, json: faion get-content productized-service-launch --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft for F-064 P3 technical-freelancer persona, global angle'}]
